items.title: Home Depot makes two major changes to win back customers
items.description: There’s nothing quite like the feeling of doing something by yourself; fixing something broken or building something new. Remember when you were a kid and you went to the store all by yourself for the first time, how proud you felt, how accomplished. As adults, we can have a similar feeling when we ...

items.title: Home Depot lays off 800 workers, says corporate employees will return to office 5 days a week
items.description: Home Depot is dealing with slower sales as fewer Americans buy houses.

items.title: Home Depot cuts 800 jobs
items.description: The roles within its Atlanta store support center are primarily concentrated in its tech organization and come as the retailer mandates a full-time return to office.

items.title: 'Home Depot Cuts Jobs, Brings Staff Back to Office 5 Days A Week' - Bloomberg
Wall Street And Main Street Are Seeing Two Different Economies
items.description: Two huge winter storms are the latest unexpected disruptions to the U.S. economy. Read why investors should pay attention to short-term and long-term market signals.
